title: Function evidence packet
purpose: Create one compact function-centric packet that collects the evidence analysts repeatedly inspect across Radar, Graph, Imports, Strings, and Notes.
actions: Load imports, strings, xrefs, score reasons, CFG status, tags, notes, and findings for one function
Add CLI inspect integration for function packets
Render packet summary in TUI Inspector

criteria: Packet generation is bounded and does not load full binary bytes
Missing CFG evidence is represented as unavailable, not failed
Tests cover function with import, string, score, and note evidence
